Year: The year in which the audits were conducted.
Quarter: The quarter of the year in which the audits were conducted. The range is from Q1 to Q4.
Compliance_Officer: The officer who oversaw the lifecycle compliance audits.
Company: The company where the audits were conducted.
Region: The geographic region of the company's plants where the audits were conducted.
Audit_Count: The number of lifecycle compliance audits overseen by the officer in the specified period.
